title: Peppery Mexican Chicken Stir-fry
description: A light and spicy whole30-friendly solo-dinner dish featuring a unique combination of mayonnaise for added flavor.
instructions: Slice the chicken into thin strips.
Peel, wash, and chop green onions into fine pieces.
Combine red chili flakes, Dijon mustard, mayonnaise, and cornstarch in a bowl to make the sauce.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken strips and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add green onion pieces and garlic; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Pour the sauce into the skillet, stirring well until thickened, about 1 minute.
If using, add tropical fruit salsa to the dish during the last minute of cooking.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
